blog.title: Blog Publishing
blog.subtitle: Canonical module-owned CRUD flow for blog posts through the blog GraphQL contract.
blog.posts.title: Posts
blog.posts.subtitle: Loaded from rustok-blog-admin via GraphQL, not wired manually in apps/admin.
blog.form.subtitle: The package owns both the list and the form. apps/admin only hosts the module route.
blog.form.title: Title
blog.form.rawWarning: This exemplar edits non-markdown content as raw serialized payload through the same GraphQL contract.
blog.table.empty: No posts yet. Create the first one from the module package form.
blog.table.title: Title
blog.error.requiredFields: Title and body are required to save a blog post.
blog.error.deleteReturnedFalse: Delete post returned false. Unpublish or archive it first.
blog.seo.title: Post SEO
blog.seo.subtitle: Explicit metadata, social tags and diagnostics for the selected blog post.
blog.seo.empty: Create or open a post first. SEO stays inside the blog editor rather than a global SEO hub.
blog.moderation.title: Comment moderation
blog.moderation.subtitle: Review the selected post's non-deleted comment queue through the Comments owner boundary.
blog.moderation.selectPost: Open a post to review its comments.
blog.moderation.unavailable: Comment moderation is unavailable in this reduced server build.
blog.moderation.loadError: Failed to load comment moderation queue
blog.moderation.empty: This post has no comments to moderate.
